'''Kip Bunyea''', also known as "'''The Kip'''", was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Smuggler/Legends|Smuggler]] from [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] who lived during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He worked for [[Aruk Besadii Aora|Aruk]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] until he defied him. When a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was placed on his head, he was captured by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

{{Char-stub}}
